7. TOTAL_BUDGET: ✗ Incomplete cost breakdown - Shows €1,060 total but the breakdown doesn't add up correctly (€140 + €500 + €50 + €120 + €250 = €1,060 ✓), however 'complete cost breakdown' should show itemized summary, which is only partially present

Actually, reconsidering item 7: The total is provided (€1,060) and all individual costs are listed in their respective sections, which constitutes a complete breakdown even if not presented in a summary format. Changing to ✓.

Final count: 6 out of 7 items fully covered (travel_dates lacks specific dates)
